pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py (VLM check). Note: the underlying dcmtk storescp receiver technically accepts any AE Title by default, but the task evaluation expects 'PACS_ARCHIVE'.
setup_task.sh (launches dcmtk storescp listening on port 11112)
setup_task.sh (launches receiver on the same local machine)

privileged_info_summary: The DICOM data loaded into Weasis is a real X-Ray Angiography (XA) file downloaded from Rubo Medical (dicom_viewer_0002.zip), despite the task description referring to it as a 'CT series'. The local PACS receiver is 'storescp' from dcmtk, which is launched on localhost at port 11112. The expected AE Title is 'PACS_ARCHIVE' as verified by the VLM prompt in verifier.py. The agent must successfully complete a DICOM association and C-STORE transfer to this local receiver.
